case_title: LISBETH RAMIREZ et al VS. MARCO ANTONIO VILLALOBOS et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-09-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
